|script      |mock xml server setup    |
|add response|{{{<status>OK</status>}}}|
|add response|{{{<status>OK</status>}}}|
|add response|{{{<status>OK</status>}}}|
|$mockUrl=   |get mock server url      |

|script       |file fixture                                                           |
|$createdFile=|create|upload.txt|containing|This is a file to test the file upload    |
|$xmlFile=    |create|test.xml  |containing|!-<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>-!|

|script                   |http test                                                             |
|set multipart value      |{"key": "value"}|as           |json|with content type|application/json|
|set multipart file       |$xmlFile        |as           |xml |with content type|application/xml |
|set value                |Some String data|for multipart|secondpart                             |
|set file                 |$createdFile    |for multipart|file                                   |
|post multipart values to |$mockUrl                                                              |
|show                     |request                                                               |
|show                     |response                                                              |
|put multipart values to  |$mockUrl                                                              |
|show                     |request                                                               |
|show                     |response                                                              |
|patch multipart values to|$mockUrl                                                              |
|show                     |request                                                               |
|show                     |response                                                              |

|table: Mock Server Message Report|

|script|mock xml server setup|
|stop                        |
